text:
おかえり！
<%me>のクセに
結構早かったわね。

ちゃんと綺麗な状態で
持って帰ってこれたのかしら……？

……うん！
問題なさそうね。
やればできるじゃない！

この調子で、精進するように！
お姉さん

You're back! That was pretty fast--even for
you, <%me>.

Did you manage to bring them back in decent
condition?

Yep! No problems here. See, you can do it
when you put your mind to it!
You gotta keep that pace up! Promise me, now!
